Rules-Glitches: Any glitches that can cause the match to be completely unplayable (e.g. by causing a softlock or a game freeze) are banned. A player who triggers such a glitch has to forfeit the current game.
Rules-Notes:
1. Nanami is banned to avoid desyncs and prevent bypassing character switch rules.

2. Chen-Mao players must be aware of the desync issues she can cause and of how to prevent them. If she is selected second on the character select screen, one of her two stages will be randomly selected for the match, which can desynchronize the game during netplay.
	a) The Chen-Mao player is responsible for resetting the game themselves to avoid this (by default, using the F3 key as player 1). As such, any would-be Chen-Mao players must be player 1 and manage resetting the game when necessary. 
		- To be player 1 on Fightcade, you must be the one to challenge your opponent.
		- Any desyncs caused by Chen-Mao will grant the game to their opponent.
		- If a player forgets to reset the game upon a loss and picks Chen-Mao for the next match, the game must be reset before the match starts (FIGHT! appears on screen). Resetting the emulator once the match has started will grant the game to the Chen-Mao player's opponent.
	b) These rules do not apply in case of a Chen-Mao mirror. Avoid desyncs by resetting the emulator after every game. In order to keep the tournament running on time, failure to take these steps may lead to disqualification of both players at an organizer's discretion.

Rules-Notes:
Players have 20 minutes to play and restart the game as many times as they want. After 20 minutes pass, they can't restart anymore and have to play through completion or until they lose all their lives. Their score for the last run is then submitted to leaderboard.

Players may choose to stop playing during the first 20 minutes if they manage to get a clear.

As long as the Black Label version is respected, players can choose to play the game on whichever platform they want (arcade PCB, Xbox 360, PS4, Switch and emulation). Just be sure to have the means to share the screen through VDO.Ninja and Discord.

Rules-Game Settings:
- Must be in the Discord.

- Timer: 99 seconds

- Rounds: 3

- Hazards: OFF

- Assists: ON

- Matches Format: Initially, all matches are Best of 3 (FT2). As we progress to Winners Finals, Losers Finals, and Grand Finals, the format shifts to Best of 5 (FT3).

- Stage Selection: We encourage Random Select for Stages; however, if both players mutually agree on a specific map, they are free to choose it.

- Reselection: Losers are allowed to switch Character, Assist, and Map; winners must stick with their choices.

- Connection: Wired ethernet only.

- "North America Only": Even though it says North America Only, other players that are not from North America can join and participate in the tournament. However, they are not allowed to host their computer on Parsec nor do Netplay; they can only join NA players hosting their computers or joining a Shadow.

- Game Ownership: It is recommended that you own JoJo's All-Star Battle R; however, all you really need is Parsec.

- Bans: Any glitches resulting in a softlock are forbidden. In the event of encountering such glitches, players must replay the match.
